# 51 — BJT UI/UX Production Review

<task>
Act as `bjt-boss` with `bjt-learner-ui`, `bjt-learning-science`, `bjt-media-experience`, `bjt-localization-japan-vietnam`, and `bjt-qa` as needed. Review or improve one UI route/flow using BJT-specific production UI/UX standards.
</task>

<required-reading>
1. `docs/design/bjt-ui-ux-production-standard.md`
2. `company/skills/bjt-ui-ux/00-bjt-ui-ux-principles.md`
3. `company/skills/bjt-ui-ux/01-bjt-design-direction-system.md`
4. `company/skills/bjt-ui-ux/08-bjt-ui-ux-review-rubric.md`
5. `company/gates/bjt-ui-ux-production-gate.md`
6. `company/gates/ui-production-gate.md`
7. `company/skills/agent-quality/00-karpathy-production-agent-skill.md`
8. `company/skills/open-design-bjt/00-open-design-bjt-adaptation.md`
9. `company/gates/open-design-bjt-ui-gate.md`
10. relevant `company/skills/bjt-ui-ux/*.md` for the target flow
11. relevant route/component/API files
</required-reading>

<instructions>
1. Pick exactly one route or flow.
2. State the design direction before editing.
3. Identify the learning outcome and primary action.
4. Apply only the BJT UI/UX skills relevant to the surface.
5. Do not add decorative UI that competes with learning.
6. Preserve no-fake-production, i18n, RBAC/privacy, and data-state rules.
7. Run the Open Design BJT five-dimension critique and fix any score below `3/5`.
8. Add/update review evidence in `company/reviews/bjt-ui-ux/`.
9. Run targeted tests/typecheck/browser review when practical.
</instructions>

<skill-routing>
- dashboard/daily/comeback: load `02-learning-focus-cognitive-load-skill.md`
- quiz/mock/result: load `03-bjt-assessment-exam-ux-skill.md`
- Japanese text/reading: load `04-japanese-reading-support-ux-skill.md`
- audio/image/video/postcard/motion: load `05-sensory-media-motion-skill.md`
- battle/share/referral/streak: load `06-motivation-social-competition-skill.md`
- mobile learner flow: load `07-mobile-daily-study-skill.md`
</skill-routing>

<definition-of-done>
- route/flow has a concrete BJT design direction
- BJT UI/UX gate status is recorded
- Open Design BJT UI gate status is recorded
- review artifact exists
- no fake progress, fake score, or distracting media is introduced
- remaining risks have owner and next action
</definition-of-done>
